title: After Enies Lobby
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 0–3.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DON'T YOU ONE ME AN APOLOGY?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Luffy! Is he really your grandpa!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: On many occasions in the past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I pushed you over bottomless cliffs,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: threw you into the jungle at night,
